OtherAssetsOrgGrp.Desc: CONTRIBUTIONS RECEIVABLE, NET OF CURRENT PORTION

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: FFJHS IS EXEMPT FROM INCOME TAXES UNDER SECTION 501(C)(3) OF THE INTERNAL REVENUE CODE AS AN ORGANIZATION FOR CONTRIBUTIONS WHICH ARE DEDUCTIBLE UNDER SECTION 170(C) OF THE CODE; AND AS AN ORGANIZATION THAT IS NOT A PRIVATE FOUNDATION AS DEFINED IN SECTION 509(A) OF THE CODE. AS OF JUNE 30, 2023, THE TAX PERIODS REMAINING OPEN FOR EXAMINATION ARE FISCAL YEARS ENDED JUNE 30, 2020 THROUGH 2023.
